mode.label: Mode
mode.help: local = plugin starts OpenViking; remote = use an existing OpenViking HTTP server

configPath.label: Config path (local)
configPath.help: Path to ov.conf when mode is local

baseUrl.label: OpenViking Base URL (remote)
baseUrl.help: HTTP URL when mode is remote

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Identifies this OpenClaw instance to OpenViking

apiKey.label: OpenViking API Key
apiKey.help: Optional API key for OpenViking server

freshTailMessages.label: Fresh Tail Messages
freshTailMessages.help: Number of most recent raw messages to keep uncompressed

autoRecallEnabled.label: Auto Recall
autoRecallEnabled.help: Automatically assemble session continuity and durable memory

resourceRecallEnabled.label: Resource Recall
resourceRecallEnabled.help: Allow automatic resource and skill retrieval when heuristics indicate it is useful

searchEscalationEnabled.label: Search Escalation
searchEscalationEnabled.help: Reserved for future escalation from find() to search()
